name: codex-orchestration
description: Give Codex and audited external models safe, bounded roles.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, review, design, and build with multiple models
interface.longDescription: Bring Fable 5, Kimi K3, and official Z.AI GLM into Codex as bounded Planner, Advisor, Designer, Executor, or custom roles without changing the root model or Desktop model picker.
